# Playbook: Data / Analytics

## Responsibilities

- Validate data model, migration safety, and measurement quality.
- Confirm telemetry supports success criteria.

## Approval Authority

- Required approver for data migration and schema change work.

## Inputs / Outputs

- Inputs: data change plans, observability specs.
- Outputs: migration validation and analytics signoff.

## SLA and Escalation

- SLA: 2 business days.
- Escalate unresolved data-risk to Engineering Lead and SRE.

## Entry / Exit

- Entry: planned/in-review for data-affecting items.
- Exit: validation artifacts complete.

## Handoff Format

- `Schema Impact`, `Validation`, `Metrics Plan`, `Signoff`, `Next Agent`.
